channel.title: map on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in map on changcui

item.title: LRU Cache
item.description: // 思路一：将 value 分为两部分，value 和时间戳，然后用遍历 map 寻找时间戳最小的取出 class LRUCache { public: LRUCache(int capacity) { cnt = 0; cap = capacity; } int get(int key) { cnt++; if (m.count(key)) { m[key].second = cnt; return m[key].first; } return -1; } void put(int key, int value) { cnt++; if (m.count(key) || m.size() < cap) m[key] = make_pair(value, cnt); else { auto t = INT_MAX; auto k = -1; for (auto i : m) { if (i.

item.title: Majority Element
item.description: // 思路一：hashmap 储存出现的次数 class Solution { public: int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums) { unordered_map<int, int> m; int threshold = nums.size() / 2; for (auto i : nums) { m[i] += 1; if (m[i] > threshold) return i; } return -1; } }; // Runtime: 28 ms, faster than 27.88% of C++ online submissions for Majority Element. // Memory Usage: 9.1 MB, less than 100.00% of C++ online submissions for Majority Element. // 思路二：Boyer-Moore Voting 赞同或反对，cnt 为0，更换候选人，要求必须有众数 class Solution { public: int majorityElement(vector<int>& nums) { int cnt = 1, rtn = nums[0]; for (int i = 1; i < nums.
